text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Just a bit more!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Yeah... I've got this! I'm gonna win! Just keep
going! Just... keep...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah! ...Damn it! Damn it all straight to hell!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Dammit... I just can't do it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I know what's causin' this. I just can't close that
three-centimeter gap.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Nothing's changed. I'm still fated to lose. My
future hasn't budged at all...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not true. The number changed from
seven to three, and even that should've been
impossible.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I have to do this. 'Cause if I don't...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spin around, startled by a loud crashing noise
behind me, and spot none other than Meisho
Doto sprawled on the floor.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm fine... I've landed on my bottom so many
times today, it's flat as a board.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, but more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, I wanted to talk with you about Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, I think, um... she's been having a lot of
nightmares.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed her bolting awake in the middle of
the night. It's gotten a lot worse lately...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping that... that you could help her out!
Please!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She'll probably get mad at me for telling you this,
but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Even though she's done so much for me, I haven't
done anything for her, so...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So I thought you might be able to help since
you're her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Like I said, I'm not actually expecting anything
from you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That goes for your ideas too. I expect practically nothing from you, but I'd still rather have almost nothing than nothing at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I don't feel like I can do anything to
help Air Shakur, but I also don't want to dash
Meisho Doto's hopes.
choice_data_list: Okay, I'll do what I can!
Okay, I'll do what I can!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll also make sure to stop falling out of bed too
loudly so she can sleep in peace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shakur's anxieties must be getting really bad if she's having nightmares...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
According to Parcae's predictions, I'm not gonna
win a single race after the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't even imagine how terrifying it must be to
head down a path of certain failure, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Even now, at this very moment...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Tch. The results haven't changed at all. Ugh, I'm
getting real fed up with this stupid
991031021222 thing!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should swap out the whole table... No,
that won't work. I'd already tried that before.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'd even settle for askin' the spirits or whatever
for help if that'd actually do anything...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! It's wrong! It's all wrong! Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've brought it down to three measly centimeters.
I'm so close... There's gotta be somethin' I can do
to make this work. If not...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: If not...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Screw it. I'm redoing it from scratch.
choice_data_list: (There must be something I can do to help...)
(There must be something I can do to help...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is watching uselessly as she heads toward the
flames really the only thing I'm capable of?
